title: lomatium marginatum var. purpureum
intro: Lomatium marginatum var. purpureum is a perennial herbaceous plant, commonly known as prairie lomatium, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Lomatium marginatum var. purpureum include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
